references.passiveText: We have a tradition here of leaving tokens at the crossroads for those who've passed. The pile has grown larger this season.
references.triggerTopicLabel: The memorial tokens at the crossroads
references.triggerDialogue: Every token represents someone {location} has lost. {target_npc} started the tradition years ago after losing their own family. They say that travelers who see the tokens sometimes leave their own, from places as far as {location_hint}. Grief connects people across distances, they told me. I didn't understand that until recently.
